prompt_text: Planhat vs ChurnZero pricing and features
response:
# Planhat vs ChurnZero: Pricing & Features

## Pricing Overview

| Aspect | Planhat | ChurnZero |
|--------|---------|-----------|
| **Model** | Usage-based + per-feature | Per seat (user-based) |
| **Entry Point** | ~$500-1,000/mo | ~$1,000+/mo |
| **Scaling** | Increases with MRR tracked | Increases with team seats |
| **Custom** | Yes | Yes |

---

## Key Features Comparison

### Planhat
✅ **Strengths:**
- Strong playbook automation
- Integrated NPS/survey tools
- Health scoring dashboard
- Real-time notifications
- Lower cost for small/mid teams
- Timeline view for customer journey

❌ **Gaps:**
- Smaller marketplace of integrations
- Less mature reporting
- Smaller user community

### ChurnZero
✅ **Strengths:**
- Deeper Salesforce integration
- Comprehensive reporting & dashboards
- Larger app ecosystem
- Multi-tenant account support
- Longer track record (established 2013)
- White-label options

❌ **Gaps:**
- Per-seat model gets expensive
- Higher baseline cost
- Steeper learning curve

---

## Decision Framework

**Choose Planhat if:**
- Budget-conscious
- Want quick implementation
- Need strong automation
- Team < 10 users

**Choose ChurnZero if:**
- Heavy Salesforce user
- Need advanced reporting
- Building internal accountability
- Enterprise requirements
- Willing to pay for maturity

Both excel at CS automation—your choice depends on **team size, budget, and integration depth needed**.
